---
name: "Feature Request 🚀"
about: "Suggest an idea or new component for the framework"
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is.

**Proposed solution**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen, including any new CSS classes or HTML components that should be created.

**Considered alternatives**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or visual mockups about the feature request here.
